wine_variety.title: Brew 10 different Vinery wine varieties — build a wine rack wall with labeled varieties

eiswein_batch.title: Produce a batch of 8 Eiswein bottles — the full-heal wine requires winter grapes and fermentation time

subtitle.text: All 26 wines. The cellar is a library. Every bottle is a record of a season that passed and a harvest that survived it.

description: CH.16 · THE GRAND CELLAR
▸ Vinery has 26 wine varieties.
The Grand Cellar is the project of bottling all 26.
This is not for stats. It is for completeness.
The cellar becomes a record of every grape variety
you planted, tended, and harvested.
The Eiswein is the centerpiece — one full-heal per bottle.
8 bottles of Eiswein is 8 guaranteed full heals for Ch17.
◈ THE 26 VINERY WINES
└ Grape varieties: each wine requires a different grape type
Collect Grape Cuttings from: village chests, wandering traders,
structure loot, Vinery-specific structure finds
└ Wine types range from: Red wines, White wines, Rosé,
Sparkling, Dessert (Eiswein), Fortified
└ Each requires: Grape growing → harvest → barrel fermentation
Fermentation time: varies by wine type
└ Full list: check JEI under vinery: for all varieties
◈ EISWEIN PRODUCTION (8-BOTTLE BATCH)
└ Requires: winter-frozen grapes (Serene Seasons winter)
└ Grape harvest timing: do not harvest until winter
One winter = one batch opportunity per vineyard
└ Scale vineyard for batch: 16+ grapevines for 8-bottle batch
(8 bottles requires ~16 frozen grape harvest minimum)
└ Fermentation time: Eiswein ferments longer than standard wines
Plan: harvest winter → fill barrel → wait → bottle in spring
└ Storage: Cold Sweat temperature consideration
Store barrels underground where Cold Sweat reads as cool
◈ CELLAR BUILD
└ Wine Rack (Vinery): decorative wine storage block
Use to build a wall-mounted bottle display
└ Barrel arrangement: each barrel labeled by grape type
(sign on each barrel = variety identifier)
└ Temperature zone: underground room, preferably insulated stone
└ Vinery Wine Press: crafting station for some wine types
▸ The cellar holds the seasons.
Each bottle is a year.
The Eiswein is the year the grapes froze on the vine
and you chose to wait instead of harvesting early.',
That patience is the bottle.
The cellar is patient seasons, preserved.
▶ Brew 10 different Vinery wine varieties [check]
▶ Produce a batch of 8 Eiswein bottles [check]
◇ Eiswein priority for Ch17: store 8 bottles in a dedicated
Shulker Box labeled 'EISWEIN — EMERGENCY ONLY'.
Each bottle = one full-HP recovery in the worst scenario.
8 bottles = 8 lives.
The Ch17 final sequence will need them.
